en: Do you have any other questions for me Counselor
Lieutenant do you have anything further for this witness
ko: 중위 이 증인에게 더 질문할 것 있습니까?

en: Thanks Danny I love Washington Excuse me I need to dismiss you
ko: 고마워 대니 워싱턴 좋다 실례합니다 퇴정시켜야 합니다

en: I beg your pardon I'm not through with my examination
I'd appreciate it if you would address me as Colonel or Sir I believe I've earned it
ko: 대령이나 각하로 불러주시면 감사하겠습니다 그럴 자격이 있다고 생각합니다

en: Defense Counsel will address the witness as Colonel or Sir
ko: 피고 변호인은 증인을 대령 또는 각하로 호칭하십시오
